text_preview:
SCADA Standards Volume 2 of 3 
Function blocks contain a listing of the supplied function blocks for use in 
programming. There is a corresponding graphical component discussed in Volume 3, 
HMI Standards. These function blocks are not to be modified without first submitting the 
suggested changes to the City for review and approval.
